#comment: The following are CMOR internal settings and should not be edited by the user
_history_template: %s; CMOR rewrote data to be consistent with <activity_id>, and <Conventions> standards
history: ESMValTool (Axel Lauer and Lisa Bock) and Dora Hegedus acknowledged for the preparation of this dataset for obs4MIPs. Please contact dora.hegedus@stfc.ac.uk for any queries regarding the dataset preparation for obs4MIPs
license: Data in this file produced by NASA is licensed under a Creative Commons Public Domain Dedication (CC0). Use of the data must be acknowledged following guidelines found at https://asdc.larc.nasa.gov/project/CALIPSO/CAL_LID_L3_Ice_Cloud-Standard-V1-00_V1-00
references: Winker, David & Cai, Xia & Vaughan, Mark & Garnier, A. & Magill, Brian & Avery, Melody & Getzewich, Brian. (2023). A Level 3 Monthly Gridded Ice Cloud Dataset Derived from a Decade of CALIOP Measurements. 10.5194/essd-2023-373
title: Mass Fraction of Cloud Ice
originData_notes: This space is for additional info relevant to how the retrieved data will be made obs4MIPs compliant.
